name: goliath/wg-dual-cta
title: Goliath – Dual CTA
description: Orange centred CTA band with heading, two paragraphs, and two action buttons.

heading.default: A Smarter Way to Handle Racking Damage

para1.default: Instead of repeatedly repairing or replacing uprights, Goliath™ changes how damage is managed. It allows you to fix the issue quickly, strengthen the structure, and reduce the likelihood of recurrence without slowing your operation down.

para2.default: There is no other system in the UK that offers the same assurance of reduced repairs, minimal downtime during installation, and cost-saving advantage that results in higher profitability for your warehouse like Goliath™.
